data.title: The Competition Authority approved the acquisition of the full ownership of AS Õhtuleht Kirjastus by Ekspress Grupp
data.description: The Estonian Competition Authority has given the green light to a deal between AS Ekspress Grupp and AS AVH Grupp that was finalized on 9 July 2025. In this agreement, Ekspress Grupp will be taking over the 50% stake in AS Õhtuleht Kirjastus that was previously held by AVH Grupp. Once the transaction is complete, Ekspress Grupp will be the sole owner of Õhtuleht Kirjastus. The finalization of this deal is subject to meeting all the necessary conditions for closure.

data.title: LYB to discuss first-quarter results Friday, May 1, 2026
data.description: LyondellBasell, a prominent player in the chemical industry, is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 1. The announcement will be made before the U.S. market opens, with a subsequent webcast and teleconference at 11 a.m. EDT on the same day. The teleconference, hosted by David Kinney, head of investor relations, will delve into the results. Interested parties can access the webcast 10 to 15 minutes before the scheduled time. This event will provide insights into the company's performance and strategies for shareholders and stakeholders.

data.title: Playtika Announces Review of Strategic Alternatives to Maximize Shareholder Value
data.description: Playtika has disclosed its plans to explore potential opportunities and strategies aimed at increasing shareholder value. This could involve a range of options and initiatives to optimize returns for investors. The company will be conducting a thorough assessment to determine the best course of action moving forward.

data.title: Parsons Expands Connected Vehicle Leadership, Delivering Statewide V2X Management System for the Utah Department of Transportation
data.description: Utah Department of Transportation has chosen Parsons to provide a vehicle-to-everything (V2X) maintenance and management system across the state. This decision underscores the state's commitment to enhancing transportation infrastructure. The initiative aims to improve road safety and efficiency by enabling vehicles to communicate with each other and with infrastructure. Parsons will play a pivotal role in deploying and maintaining this cutting-edge system, reflecting their expertise in this field. This undertaking signifies a significant investment in advancing technology for transportation, with potential benefits for all road users.

data.title: Tallinn City Council adopted two detailed plans of Tallinna Sadam
data.description: On April 2, 2026, the Tallinn City Council approved two detailed plans concerning AS Tallinna Sadam's properties. These plans cover the passenger terminal A and the cruise terminal area, as well as terminal D and its surroundings. Following the approval, the Tallinn City Planning Board and City Government are coordinating a public review process.

data.title: CORRECTION -- AirSculpt Technologies Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2025 Results
data.description: On April 2nd, 2026, AirSculpt Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AIRS) issued a release regarding a one-time non-cash adjustment connected to the closure of its London facility. Following a review, the Company discovered inaccuracies in the calculation of Adjusted EBITDA, Adjusted EBITDA Margin, and Adjusted Net (Loss)/Income. The updated information has been released, showcasing revised figures to rectify the earlier inaccuracies.

data.title: Maximus announces $0.33 per share as quarterly cash dividend.
data.description: A recent report indicates that over 2,000 people have been affected by a new viral outbreak in the city. Authorities have confirmed at least 150 cases of the virus, with 10 reported deaths so far. The local government has responded by implementing quarantine measures in highly affected areas and urging the public to practice good hygiene to prevent further spread of the virus. Medical facilities are reportedly overwhelmed with the increasing number of patients seeking treatment. The situation is being closely monitored by health officials.

data.title: Epson RapidReceipt RR-600W Document Scanner Named a Good Housekeeping 2026 Cleaning Awards Winner
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 6, 2026, Epson introduced RapidReceipt® RR-600W Wireless Receipt and Document Scanner aimed at transforming household paperwork into intelligent digital assets to support AI workflows. This initiative by RapidReceipt facilitates the setup of effective home offices, streamlining daily tasks.

data.title: Vertical Aerospace Achieves Historic Piloted Thrustborne Transition
data.description: In a significant development, global aerospace and technology company Vertical Aerospace (NYSE: EVTL) has made history by successfully executing a piloted thrustborne transition with a full-scale eVTOL aircraft. This achievement marks a major milestone in aviation, as the aircraft was able to take off vertically similar to a helicopter and smoothly transition into wingborne flight akin to a fixed-wing aircraft. This breakthrough showcases the defining capability of eVTOL aviation and positions Vertical as a key player in this emerging industry.
